jd_text:
About us:Soar is a global fintech startup that specializes in financing and investment. Currently headquartered in Saudi Arabia, Soar is growing throughout the region with a mission to help people achieve their financial goals with innovative financial and property investment solutions and tools through its multi-purpose platform, designed to offer a simple and seamless user experience.
About the Role:
We are looking for a visionary Head of SAP Finance Product to bridge the gap between financial strategy and technical execution. In this pivotal role, you will not just "manage" our SAP landscape; you will own it as a Product. You will drive the roadmap for our SAP S/4HANA ecosystem, ensuring it serves as a scalable, automated, and compliant backbone for our rapidly growing Fintech operations in Saudi Arabia.You will lead a cross-functional team to deliver high-velocity financial innovations while ensuring strict adherence to SAMA (Saudi Central Bank) cybersecurity guidelines and ZATCA Phase 2 e-invoicing integrations.
Key Responsibilities
1. Product Strategy & Roadmap OwnershipDefine the Vision: Treat the SAP Finance landscape as an internal product, creating a long-term roadmap that aligns with company goals (e.g., IPO readiness, regional expansion, new product launches).Stakeholder Management: Act as the primary bridge between Finance, Treasury, and Tech, translating complex business requirements into scalable SAP technical solutions.
2. KSA Regulatory & Compliance LeadershipZATCA Integration: Lead the end-to-end technical compliance for ZATCA Phase 2 (Integration Phase), ensuring seamless real-time reporting of e-invoices.Tax & Zakat Automation: Configure and maintain automated workflows for VAT, Withholding Tax, and Zakat to ensure zero-error regulatory reporting.SAMA Compliance: Ensure all SAP financial data processes meet SAMA's strict data sovereignty, audit trail, and cybersecurity standards.
3. Technical Architecture & IntegrationCore Fintech Integration: Architect robust APIs and integration layers between SAP S/4HANA and core Fintech systems (Payment Gateways, Core Banking, Treasury Management).S/4HANA Optimization: Oversee the configuration and health of core modules: FI (GL, AP, AR)Automation First: Drive the adoption of SAP BTP and Fiori to automate reconciliation, bank statement processing, and month-end closing cycles.
4. Team & Vendor ManagementLeadership: Recruit, mentor, and lead a high-performing team of Functional Consultants, ABAP Developers, and Product Owners.Vendor Governance: Manage relationships with SAP System Integrators (SIs) and external partners, ensuring delivery quality and cost efficiency.
Requirements:Education & Certifications
Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Finance, or related field.Master's/MBA is strongly preferred.CMA / CPA / ACCA certification is a strong plus (demonstrating financial acumen).SAP Certifications: SAP S/4HANA Finance or SAP Activate Project Manager.
Experience:
10+ Years of total experience in SAP Finance ecosystems.3+ Years in a leadership role (Head of Finance Systems, Product Lead, or Solution Architect).KSA Market Expertise: Proven track record with ZATCA e-invoicing, VAT, and SAMA regulations is non-negotiable.Fintech/Banking Exposure: Experience integrating SAP with banking interfaces (Host-to-Host, SWIFT, SARIE) or high-volume transaction platforms.
Skills & Mindset:
Technical Depth: Hands-on experience with SAP FICO, ABAP concepts, and Fiori Apps.Product Mindset: Ability to prioritize features based on business value rather than just technical requirements.Language: Fluency in English is required; Arabic is highly advantageous for regulatory liaison.
